creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
At Tue, 22 Apr 2008 08:40:00 GMT,
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> 
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/122981'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
>

> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=122981
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       New Port: emulators/gemrb
> >Arrival-Date:   Tue Apr 22 08:40:00 UTC 2008

Please disregard this problem report, it is identical to
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=122980

I accidentally submitted the PR twice.

I apologize for the inconvenience.

Regards,
Tim
